title: UAE stocks sell off as markets reopen from two-day closure after Iranian strikes
summary_full: Exchanges in Dubai and Abu Dhabi were closed for two days after Iran launched a wave of strikes on the Gulf nation.
summary_public: Exchanges in Dubai and Abu Dhabi were closed for two days after Iran launched a wave of strikes on the Gulf nation.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran launched a wave of strikes on the Gulf nation.
